about.title: ABOUT DARKFORGE FILES
about.subtitle: Modern File Laboratory in Your Browser
about.description: DarkForge Files is a modern file utility platform capable of manipulating, converting, compressing, expanding, analyzing, repairing, and processing files directly in the browser whenever possible.
about.localProcessing.desc: Your files are processed locally in your browser. Your files are never permanently stored on our servers.
about.privacy.desc: We prioritize your privacy. All file processing is done client-side whenever possible.
about.fast.desc: Processing files directly in your browser means no long upload times.
about.free.desc: DarkForge Files is free to use. No hidden costs or subscriptions.
about.developer.name: Skyy
about.developer.bio: Building modern web tools and experimental projects.
contact.title: CONTACT US
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? Contact us.
contact.name: Name
privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.description: DarkForge Files processes files locally whenever possible. Your files are never permanently stored on our servers.
privacy.local.desc: Most file processing is done directly in your browser using modern web technologies.
privacy.noStorage.desc: We do not permanently store your files on our servers. Files are deleted after processing is complete.
privacy.analytics.desc: We use anonymous analytics to improve our services.
terms.title: TERMS OF SERVICE
terms.description: By using DarkForge Files, you agree to the following terms of service.
terms.usage.desc: DarkForge Files is provided for personal and commercial use. You are responsible for the content you process.
terms.limitations.desc: We are not responsible for losses caused by the use of this service.
terms.changes.desc: We reserve the right to change these terms of service at any time.
faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: Yes, DarkForge Files is free to use. There are no hidden costs.
faq.a2: Yes, your files are processed locally in your browser. Files are never stored on our servers.
faq.a3: We support ZIP, PDF, PNG, JPG, WEBP, MP4, MP3, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, JSON, and many more.
faq.a4: File size limits depend on the tool used and your browser's capacity. Generally up to 1GB.
faq.q5: How do I contact the developer?
faq.a5: You can contact the developer via email at raizenamericano@gmail.com or WhatsApp at +30 694 246 3620.
